channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.24 (Build 20260612)
item.description:
What's New

feat(injection): use Accessibility API atomic replacement for overlay launchers

Switch Spotlight/Raycast/Alfred from synthetic CGEvent (.autocomplete)

to AX atomic replacement (.axDirect), eliminating the race with inline

autocomplete that scrambled fast Vietnamese typing.

  • Map overlay launchers to .axDirect in AppBehaviorDetector
  • Rewrite injectViaAX with UTF-16 (NSString) offset math, fixing the

grapheme/UTF-16 mismatch that corrupted cut positions for diacritics;

add selection-based + full-value strategies, suggestion merge,

bounds-check and precomposed mapping

  • Hoist .axDirect out of the backspace step; bs==0 goes through AX for

overlay launchers only (InjectionMethodInfo.isOverlay) so an

auto-selected suggestion is cleared atomically, while Firefox-style

contexts keep the synthetic path for plain inserts

  • Context-aware fallback (.autocomplete for overlays, backspace+text for

Firefox content areas)

  • Migrate word-break path to atomic injectSync for consistency

Hardening:

  • Restore the original selection when the selection-based strategy

partially fails and the full-value rewrite cannot complete, preventing

the synthetic fallback from over-deleting

  • Read field length via kAXNumberOfCharacters and defer the full kAXValue

copy to the full-value strategy; guard against a stale value before

splicing

  • Compute the full-value caret from recomposed prefix+insert to survive

canonical recomposition across the splice boundary

  • Set a process-wide AX messaging timeout (0.25s) at startup and a

tighter per-element timeout (0.1s) in injectViaAX; cap AX retries at a

250ms budget so a hung app degrades to the synthetic fallback instead

of stalling the event tap

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
